address.address: Plot A2, Block A, Sector 125 India

pos_sentences: The course curriculum of my program covers almost every aspect of the market, and the curriculum designed is best suited for any management student these days.
They provide internships to students who want to do an internship. They help them get internships in many companies based on their eligibility.
Placement in reputed companies only happens with a strong brand name, and the students at Asian Business School are highly talented.

They provide loans to the students who need it most. Otherwise, the scholarship facility is also one of the best financial assistance options here. Students can earn scholarships by participating in many competitions.
In the complete cycle of PGDM for 2 years, we went many times for workshops and industrial visits.
Wardens are also very good and caring by nature so that the hostelers can deal with them politely.
The final verdict about college is that it is worth spending your $610,000 on this college.
neg_sentences: Companies that come to the college have very tough interviews for the students, and most of the students are unable to crack any of them.
College not providing any scholarship facility to the students is a drawback of the college.
The hostel rooms are small and have to be shared with three people, which leads to messy and untidy rooms
